case_title: BARBONI, RICHARD et al vs. ARMSTRONG, CLARENCE et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, CLARENCE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, CLARENCE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBONI, RICHARD TURPIN, ROLLIE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-15-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOT SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONF. JURY TRIAL TO STAND.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ATNY RICHARD ALEXANDER PRESENT FOR PLTFS DEFT CLARENCE ARMSTRONG PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, CLARENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE STREET INCLUDING APT #203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,083.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,541.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-06-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BEFORE 5PM ON 8-6-96, PLTF SHALL PAY TO DEFT THE SUM OF $433.00; VACATE THE JUDGMNT, AND DISMISS ACTION. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, EXECUTION SHALL PROCEED.
